items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
Summer Woven Zip Crossbody Bag A crossbody bag that doubles as a makeup bag, featuring exquisite weaving and a compact body. It is an essential accessory for the upcoming summer. The double zipper offers better protection, and the large capacity makes it a must-have. Style No.: 789109 Dimensions: 22*12.5*5cm

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
The small lucky bag has become a fashion staple for girls in recent years. Its elegant and simple style has won the love of people of all ages. The interior is made of tech nylon, which is lightweight and easy to clean. Even when carrying many items, it helps reduce the burden. The strap features a knot design, allowing for easy adjustment. It can be used as a handbag; after tightening the drawstring, it looks like a cloud bag, making it perfect for summer outfits. Dimensions: 21*16.6*1CM3005s

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival Drawstring Dustbag "Garbage Bag" really easy to match! A lazy, free-spirited vibe 💥 With a classic woven design, creating a timeless fashion staple 🔥 The drawstring closure creates a natural opening with a crumpled look and soft, smooth calfskin. Every detail reveals this bag's lazy yet exquisite feel~🤏 Not only lightweight but also spacious. If you want a bag with a relaxed vibe, get this "garbage bag" that brings you joy ✨ Model 3005
Size: 32x23

specs.rawTitle:
Genuine quality
New Arrival Drawstring Dustbag "Garbage Bag" really easy to match! A lazy, free-spirited vibe 💥 With a classic woven design, creating a timeless fashion staple 🔥 The drawstring closure creates a natural opening with a crumpled look and soft, smooth calfskin. Every detail reveals this bag's lazy yet exquisite feel~🤏 Not only lightweight but also spacious. If you want a bag with a relaxed vibe, get this "garbage bag" that brings you joy ✨ Model 3005
Size: 32x23

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival ❤️ Woven Small Square Bag
Most existing styles are a bit trendy
and a bit hard to style
So I picked this one!
This small square bag is similar to the Cloud Bag in small size
But! It is lighter than the Cloud Bag and has much more capacity
This is a little cutie that crosses all age groups
I like it, Mom likes it, and even Grandma will like it!
And the large woven pattern won't look old-fashioned~
As someone who is half a fashionista, I think
this is a very excellent small bag!
Specially bought a ZP to develop
Model 3001S Size 22*15*8cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
Shoulder tote - a lunch bag you can just grab and go. Made with classic intrecciato weaving, embodying Bottega's artisan spirit. The entire body is crafted from top-tier Happa lambskin, very soft, lightweight, and the small shape is cute and exquisite. The interior capacity is also sufficient; it can be carried by hand or under the arm, quite practical! The bottom features a gold metal base to prevent wear. The details are really spot on! The elegant commuter bag for early risers is the one to choose. 3002 Dimensions: 22x13x9.5

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New classic Loop redesign, oversized ring clasp allows bag to fold or be used as a handle. Crossbody or shoulder strap, detachable to carry as a handbag. Versatile, effortless and composed, lazy yet elegant, creating a subtle sense of luxury.
 Model No. 3003 Dimensions 19X12X9cm

items.name_en: M14162 Murakami! This Zippy wallet is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, featuring playful Monogram flowers on Monogram coated canvas, interpreting the Japanese artist's 'Superflat' style. With an all-around zip closure, it features practical elements such as multiple card slots, a zip coin pocket, and a large ticket pocket. 21 x 12 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width).
items.name_cn: M14162 Murakami! This Zippy wallet is from the Louis Vuitton x Takashi Murakami collaboration series, featuring playful Monogram flowers on Monogram coated canvas, interpreting the Japanese artist's 'Superflat' style. With an all-around zip closure, it features practical elements such as multiple card slots, a zip coin pocket, and a large ticket pocket. 21 x 12 x 2 cm (Length x Height x Width).

items.name_en: M13908 White Gradient! Zippy Zip Wallet! Featuring cool canvas with soft leather lining, it includes practical dividers and card slots for easy storage of credit cards, cash, receipts, etc. The fold-over closure makes it compact and portable.
items.name_cn:
M13908 White Gradient! Zippy Zip Wallet! Featuring cool canvas with soft leather lining, it includes practical dividers and card slots for easy storage of credit cards, cash, receipts, etc. The fold-over closure makes it compact and portable.
Size: 19.5×10.5×2.5cm.

items.name_en: M14134 Pocket Card Holder, White Gradient! This pocket wallet is made of Monogram Macassar coated canvas, with a consistent bright tone for the calfskin trim and neat lining. The compact design features pockets, card slots, and an outer pocket to hold credit cards and transit cards.
items.name_cn:
M14134 Pocket Card Holder, White Gradient! This pocket wallet is made of Monogram Macassar coated canvas, with a consistent bright tone for the calfskin trim and neat lining. The compact design features pockets, card slots, and an outer pocket to hold credit cards and transit cards.
Size: 7.5 x 11.1 x 1 cm
